nba.title: NBA playoff intel: Early buzz on the Lakers, Celtics, Cavs, Pistons Spurs and Warriors
nba.summary: Are the Lakers toast? Is the Spurs' 3-point prowess real? We canvass the league on six storylines that could define the postseason.

nba.title: NBA playoff watch: Only two games left for all 30 teams
nba.summary: All 30 teams play Friday, with plenty left to be decided. Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery.

nba.title: SGA, Jokic among at least 168 out NBA-wide Fri.
nba.summary: Around the NBA, no fewer than 168 players were held out of Friday's games, including reigning MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, three-time MVP Nikola Jokic and 14 members of the Memphis Grizzlies.

nba.title: Wembanyama checks another 'box,' hits 65 games
nba.summary: Victor Wembanyama reached the 65-game threshold for awards eligibility on Friday with a 40-point outing that included 13 rebounds in a 139-120 win over the Dallas Mavericks.

nba.title: Celtics tie NBA record with 29 3s; clinch 2-seed
nba.summary: The Celtics tied the franchise and NBA record with 29 3s on their way to clinching the Eastern Conference's No. 2 playoff seed in a blowout win over the Pelicans on Friday night.

nba.title: Redick: 'Everybody' wants to face hobbled Lakers
nba.summary: Lakers coach JJ Redick believes other West teams that still have their seeding to be determined prefer L.A. as their first-round opponent in the playoffs.

nba.title: 76ers' Embiid out of hospital; no timeline to play
nba.summary: Sixers star Joel Embiid has been discharged from a Houston hospital and is heading back to Philadelphia, with the team saying there is no set timeline for his return to the court.

nba.title: Heat waive Rozier, open roster spot for addition
nba.summary: Miami guard Terry Rozier, who has been on leave since October amid a sports gambling probe, has been waived by the Heat.

nba.title: Donovan not reading into Reinsdorf's endorsement
nba.summary: Bulls coach Billy Donovan, who has yet to decide on his future with the team, appreciated team president and CEO Michael Reinsdorf's endorsement of him but said he understood "everybody's got to look

nba.title: NBA fines Magic $25K for injury report violation
nba.summary: The NBA fined the Orlando Magic $25,000 on Thursday for violating league injury reporting rules before Monday night's home game against the Detroit Pistons.

soccer.title: West Ham have fresh hope - but Spurs now in uncharted territory
soccer.summary: West Ham's thumping win over Wolves not only boosts their own Premier League survival hopes, but plunges Tottenham into the drop zone - and to new depths.

soccer.title: De Zerbi 'not surprised' by reaction to Greenwood comments
soccer.summary: Tottenham manager Roberto de Zerbi says he was "not surprised" by the reaction from supporters over comments he made about Mason Greenwood.

soccer.title: Fernandez sorry but will miss Man City - Rosenior
soccer.summary: Chelsea midfielder Enzo Fernandez is still unavailable for the upcoming home match against Manchester City despite a recent apology, head coach Liam Rosenior says.

soccer.title: Nike investigating issue with World Cup kits
soccer.summary: Sportswear giant Nike is investigating a design issue with the shirts set to be worn by several teams - including England - at this summer's World Cup.

soccer.title: Is Fernandes' own goal the worst of all time?
soccer.summary: Porto's Martim Fernandes scored a bizarre own goal for Porto against Nottingham Forest on Thursday, but how does it compare to the worst of all-time?

soccer.title: Guardiola would 'love' Silva to stay at Man City
soccer.summary: Pep Guardiola says he would "love" captain Bernardo Silva to "finish his career" at Manchester City but it is up to the player to make the decision on whether he stays or leaves this summer.

soccer.title: I feel complete backing from owners and fans - Slot
soccer.summary: Liverpool manager Arne Slot insists he feels "complete support" from the club's hierarchy and fans despite a run of poor on-field performances and growing discontent about his future as manager

soccer.title: Howe '100% committed' to Newcastle but 'I just need support'
soccer.summary: Head coach Eddie Howe says he is "100% committed" to Newcastle United, but it is "very difficult" to look too far beyond the end of the season.

soccer.title: Consultant leads review into Old Firm cup disorder
soccer.summary: Sports event consultant Mark Blackbourne will lead the Scottish FA's investigation into the disorder that followed the Scottish Cup quarter-final between Rangers and Celtic in March.

soccer.title: Sutton's predictions v boxing promoter & Arsenal fan Frank Warren
soccer.summary: Chris Sutton takes on boxing promoter Frank Warren plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's Premier League fixtures.
